# linters examples

## Example requests

- "Set up lint gates for C/C++ and C# in CI."

- "Add ruff + mypy + shellcheck + markdownlint with baseline adoption."

- "Create suppression policy and phased rollout for existing warnings."

## Expected outputs

- Language-to-linter matrix

- Local and CI commands

- Baseline/adoption phases

- Suppression and governance checklist
